name: token-optimizer-statusline
description: See your Claude Code context health, efficiency, and usage limits in the VS Code status bar.

commands.title: Token Optimizer: Enable Live Usage (authoritative 5h/7d limits)

tokenOptimizer.liveUsage.markdownDescription: Show **always-fresh** 5-hour and 7-day usage limits even when no Claude Code terminal is open. When on, the extension reads your existing Claude subscription login (the same one Claude Code already uses for `/usage`) to look up your usage. **This costs zero model tokens** — it is a status lookup, not a message — and is never a billed API call. Off by default; the limits still show from the status-line sidecar when a terminal has rendered recently.

tokenOptimizer.staleAfterSeconds.markdownDescription: How many seconds before sidecar usage-limit data is considered stale and labeled `(est)` (or refreshed via Live Usage if enabled).
